name: io.github.squidcode/timebook
title: Timebook
description: Track time on usetimebook.com - start/stop timers, log entries, list projects/clients.

environmentVariables.name: TIMEBOOK_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Timebook API base URL. Defaults to https://usetimebook.com.

environmentVariables.name: TIMEBOOK_WEB_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Timebook web URL used during `timebook login`. Defaults to https://usetimebook.com.
